017508:     function vehicleTargetInfo(vehicle) {
017509:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return { type: null, id: null };
017510:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
017511:             .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
017512:         for (const item of containers) {
017513:             const type = String(item.target_type ?? item.targetType ?? '').toLowerCase();
017514:             const id = normaliseMissionId(item.target_id ?? item.targetId);
017515:             if ((type === 'mission' || type === 'building') && id !== null && id !== '0') return { type, id };
017516:             const missionId = normaliseMissionId(item.mission_id ?? item.missionId);
017517:             if (missionId !== null && missionId !== '0') return { type: 'mission', id: missionId };
017518:             const buildingId = normaliseMissionId(item.target_building_id ?? item.targetBuildingId);
017519:             if (buildingId !== null && buildingId !== '0') return { type: 'building', id: buildingId };
017520:         }
017521:         return { type: null, id: null };
017522:     }

017524:     function vehicleSearchSignal(vehicle) {
017525:         if (!vehicle || typeof vehicle !== 'object') return '';
017526:         const containers = [vehicle, vehicle.options, vehicle.params, vehicle.vehicle, vehicle.data, vehicle.vehicleData, vehicle._vehicleData]
017527:             .filter(item => item && typeof item === 'object');
017528:         const values = [];
017529:         for (const item of containers) {
017530:             values.push(item.caption, item.name, item.vehicle_type_caption, item.vehicleTypeCaption, item.vehicle_type_name, item.vehicleTypeName, item.type_caption, item.typeCaption, item.title);
017531:         }
017532:         try { values.push(vehicle?._icon?.title, vehicle?._icon?.alt, vehicle?._icon?.getAttribute?.('aria-label')); } catch (err) {}
017533:         return values.filter(Boolean).join(' ');
017534:     }

017536:     function vehicleStatusBucket(vehicle) {
017537:         const status = vehicleStatusCode(vehicle);
017538:         if ([1, 2].includes(status)) return 'available';
017539:         if (status === 3) return 'travelling';
017540:         if (status === 4) return 'scene';
017541:         if ([7, 8].includes(status)) return 'transport';
017542:         return 'other';
017543:     }

017547:             try { resourceGapGroup.clearLayers(); resourceGapGroup.remove(); } catch (err) {}
017548:         }
017549:         resourceGapLabels.clear();
017550:         resourceGapGroup = null;
017551:     }

018686:     function heatmapPointFromObject(item) {
018687:         if (!item) return null;
018688:         let lat = item.lat ?? item.latitude ?? item.position?.lat ?? item.options?.lat;
018689:         let lng = item.lng ?? item.lon ?? item.longitude ?? item.position?.lng ?? item.options?.lng;
018690:         if ((!Number.isFinite(Number(lat)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(lng))) && typeof item.getLatLng === 'function') {
018691:         try { const point = item.getLatLng(); lat = point?.lat; lng = point?.lng; } catch (err) {}
018692:         }
018693:         lat = Number(lat); lng = Number(lng);
018694:         return Number.isFinite(lat) && Number.isFinite(lng) ? { lat, lng } : null;
018695:     }
018696: 
018697:     function heatmapSourcePoints() {
018698:         const requestedService = state.heatmap.service;
018699:         const cacheKey = [state.heatmap.source, requestedService, markerRegistryRevision, buildingRegistryRevision, vehicleDataRevision, currentUserIdCached()].join(':');
018700:         const now = Date.now();
018701:         if (heatmapSourceCache.key === cacheKey && now - heatmapSourceCache.createdAt <= HEATMAP_SOURCE_CACHE_MS) return heatmapSourceCache.points;
018702: 
018703:         const points = [];
018704:         if (state.heatmap.source === 'vehicles') {
018705:         for (const vehicle of getVehicleMarkerLayers()) {
018706:             const point = heatmapPointFromObject(vehicle);
018707:             if (!point) continue;
018708:             const service = heatmapServiceFromSignal([vehicle.caption, vehicle.name, vehicle.vehicle_type, vehicle.vehicle_type_caption, vehicle.options?.title, vehicle._icon?.title, vehicle._icon?.alt].filter(Boolean).join(' '));
018709:             if (requestedService !== 'all' && service !== requestedService) continue;
018710:             points.push(point);
018711:         }
018712:         } else {
018713:         const currentUserId = currentUserIdCached();
018714:         const activeBuildingsById = new Map(getBuildingMarkerLayers().map(layer => [String(layer?.building_id ?? layer?.id ?? ''), layer]));
018715:         for (const building of getBuildingMarkerCache()) {
018716:             if (!building) continue;
018717:             if (currentUserId !== null && (building.user_id === undefined || building.user_id === null || String(building.user_id) !== currentUserId)) continue;
018718:             const activeLayer = activeBuildingsById.get(String(building.id ?? building.building_id ?? ''));
018719:             const point = heatmapPointFromObject(building) || heatmapPointFromObject(activeLayer);
018720:             if (!point) continue;
018721:             const service = heatmapServiceFromSignal([building.caption, building.name, building.building_type_caption, building.type_name, building.building_marker_image, activeLayer?.options?.title, activeLayer?._icon?.title].filter(Boolean).join(' '), building.building_type);
018722:             if (requestedService !== 'all' && service !== requestedService) continue;
018723:             points.push(point);
018724:         }
018725:         }
018726: 
018727:         heatmapSourceCache = { key: cacheKey, createdAt: now, points };
018728:         return points;
018729:     }

015653:     function refreshPersonalVehicleData(force = false) {
015654:         const now = Date.now();
015655:         if (vehicleApiFetchPromise) return vehicleApiFetchPromise;
015656:         if (!force && vehicleApiLastError && now - vehicleApiLastError < VEHICLE_API_ERROR_BACKOFF_MS) return Promise.resolve(false);
015657:         if (!force && vehicleApiReady && now - vehicleApiLastFetch < VEHICLE_API_MIN_REFRESH_MS) return Promise.resolve(true);
015658: 
015659:         vehicleApiFetchPromise = runtimeFetch(new URL('/api/vehicles', document.baseURI || pageWindow.location.href), {
015660:         credentials: 'same-origin',
015661:         cache: 'no-store',
015662:         headers: { Accept: 'application/json' }
015663:         })
015664:         .then(response => {
015665:             if (!response.ok) throw new Error(`Vehicle API ${response.status}`);
015666:             return response.json();
015667:         })
015668:         .then(payload => {
015669:             const records = normaliseVehicleApiPayload(payload);
015670:             const next = new Map();
015671:             for (const vehicle of records) {
015672:                 const id = vehicleRecordId(vehicle);
015673:                 if (id !== null) next.set(id, vehicle);
015674:             }
015675:             personalVehicleApiCache.clear();
015676:             for (const [id, vehicle] of next) personalVehicleApiCache.set(id, vehicle);
015677:             vehicleApiReady = true;
015678:             vehicleApiLastFetch = Date.now();
015679:             vehicleStatusLastUpdate = vehicleApiLastFetch;
015680:             vehicleApiLastError = 0;
015681:             vehicleDataRevision += 1;

022189:     function missionRequirementsVehicleType(element) {
022190:         const scopes = [];
022191:         const addScope = scope => {
022192:         if (scope && !scopes.includes(scope)) scopes.push(scope);

023446: 
023447:     function missionRequirementsRemoveRecord(source) {
023448:         const record = missionRequirementsRecords.get(source);
023449:         if (!record) {
023450:             missionRequirementsRestoreSource(source);
023451:             if (source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') source.remove?.();
023452:             return;
023453:         }
023454:         if (record.frame) runtimeCancelAnimationFrame(record.frame);
023455:         runtimeUntrackObserver(record.observer);
023456:         try { record.panel?.remove(); } catch (err) {}
023457:         missionRequirementsRestoreSource(record.source);
023458:         if (record.source?.getAttribute?.('data-mcms-requirements-anchor') === '1') record.source.remove?.();
023459:         missionRequirementsRecords.delete(source);
023460:     }

023508:     function missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc) {
023509:         for (const record of missionRequirementsRecords.values()) {
023510:             if (record.source?.ownerDocument === doc) missionRequirementsScheduleRecord(record);
023511:         }
023512:     }
023513: 
023514:     function observeMissionRequirementsFrame(frame) {
023515:         if (!frame || missionRequirementsObservedFrames.has(frame)) return;
023516:         missionRequirementsObservedFrames.add(frame);
023517:         const onLoad = () => scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(20);
023518:         frame.addEventListener('load', onLoad);
023519:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => frame.removeEventListener('load', onLoad));
023520:     }
023521: 
023522:     function observeMissionRequirementsDocument(doc) {
023523:         if (!doc) return;
023524:         ensureMissionRequirementsDocumentStyle(doc);
023525:         if (missionRequirementsObservedDocuments.has(doc)) return;
023526:         missionRequirementsObservedDocuments.add(doc);
023527:         try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionRequirementsFrame); } catch (err) {}
023528:         runtimeListen(doc, 'change', event => {
023529:             if (!event.target?.matches?.('.vehicle_checkbox, input[type="checkbox"][vehicle_type_id]')) return;
023530:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);
023531:         }, true);
023532:         const root = doc.documentElement || doc.body;
023533:         if (!root) return;
023534:         const activitySelector = '#missing_text, [data-mcms-requirements-anchor], #mission_vehicle_driving, #mission_vehicle_at_mission, #vehicle_show_table_body_all, #occupied, .vehicle_checkbox, [vehicle_type_id], [data-vehicle-type-id], [data-vehicle_type_id], [data-equipment-types], [data-equipment-type], [data-current-personnel], [data-min-personnel], [data-max-personnel], [id^="mission_water_holder"], [id^="mission_foam_holder"], [id^="mission_pump_holder"], #lightbox_box, #lightbox, .lightbox_content, .modal, [role="dialog"], .ui-dialog, iframe, frame';
023535:         const view = doc.defaultView || pageWindow;
023536:         const MutationObserverCtor = view?.MutationObserver || pageWindow.MutationObserver || MutationObserver;
023537:         const observer = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserverCtor(mutations => {
023538:             const relevant = mutations.some(mutation => {
023539:                 if (mutation.target?.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}`)) return false;
023540:                 if (mutationTouchesSelector(mutation, activitySelector)) return true;
023541:                 return false;
023542:             });
023543:             if (!relevant) return;
023544:             try { doc.querySelectorAll('iframe, frame').forEach(observeMissionRequirementsFrame); } catch (err) {}
023545:             scheduleMissionRequirementsScan(35);
023546:             missionRequirementsScheduleDocumentRecords(doc);
023547:         }));
023548:         observer.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true });
023549:     }

001773:         } catch (err) {}
001774:         break;

001776: 
001777:         // Fallback for malformed but still recognisable object fragments.
001778:         const parsedPairs = {};
001779:         const pairPattern = /["']?([a-z][\w -]*)["']?\s*:\s*(?:"([^"]*)"|'([^']*)'|([^,}\]]+))/gi;
001780:         let match;
001781:         while ((match = pairPattern.exec(text))) {
001782:         const key = match[1];
001783:         const pairValue = match[2] ?? match[3] ?? match[4] ?? '';
001784:         parsedPairs[key] = pairValue;
001785:         }
001786:         if (Object.keys(parsedPairs).length) {
001787:         const formatted = formatMissingRequirementObject(parsedPairs);
001788:         if (formatted) return formatted;
001789:         }
001790: 
001791:         return text.replace(/^[{\[]+|[}\]]+$/g, '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
001792:     }
001793: 
001794:     function removeOldInstances() {
001795:         document.querySelectorAll(`#${SCRIPT.controlId}, #${SCRIPT.panelId}, #${SCRIPT.toastId}, #${SCRIPT.payoutFlashId}, #${SCRIPT.criticalDrawerId}, #${SCRIPT.vehicleStatusId}, #${SCRIPT.majorIncidentFeedId}, #${SCRIPT.missionInspectorId}, #${SCRIPT.missionRequirementsPanelId}, #${SCRIPT.helpCenterId}, #${SCRIPT.oldControlId}, #${SCRIPT.cleanExitId}, #${SCRIPT.oldGeoLabelLayerId}`)
001796:         .forEach(el => el.remove());
001797: 
001798:         document.querySelectorAll('style').forEach(style => {
001799:         const text = style.textContent || '';
001800:         if (style.id.startsWith('mc-map-command-') || (text.includes('mcms-') && text.includes('data-mc-map-skin'))) {
001801:             style.remove();
001802:         }
001803:         });
001804:     }
001805: 
001806:     function addStyle(css) {
001807:         const style = document.createElement('style');
001808:         style.id = SCRIPT.styleId;
001809:         style.textContent = css;
001810:         const parent = document.head || document.documentElement;
001811:         if (parent) parent.appendChild(style);
001812:         else document.addEventListener('readystatechange', () => (document.head || document.documentElement)?.appendChild(style), { once: true });
001813:     }

021888:     function missionRequirementsEscapeRegex(value) {
021889:         return String(value || '').replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
021890:     }
021891: 
021892:     function missionRequirementsNumber(value) {
021893:         const digits = String(value ?? '').replace(/[^0-9-]/g, '');
021894:         const number = Number.parseInt(digits, 10);
021895:         return Number.isFinite(number) ? Math.max(0, number) : 0;
021896:     }
021897: 
021898:     function missionRequirementsOptionalNumber(value) {
021899:         const text = String(value ?? '').trim();
021900:         if (!/\d/u.test(text)) return null;
021901:         return missionRequirementsNumber(text);
021902:     }
021903: 
021904:     function missionRequirementsCapacity(min = 0, max = min, known = null) {
021905:         const safeMin = Math.max(0, Number(min) || 0);
021906:         let safeMax = max === null || max === undefined ? null : Math.max(safeMin, Number(max) || 0);
021907:         if (safeMax !== null && !Number.isFinite(safeMax)) safeMax = null;
021908:         const exact = known === true ? true : known === false ? false : safeMax !== null && safeMin === safeMax;
021909:         return { min: safeMin, max: safeMax, known: exact, value: safeMin };
021910:     }

021925:         const derivedRequiredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : missing + onSite.max;

021927:             ? missionRequirementsCapacity(requiredCapacity?.min ?? requiredCapacity?.value ?? derivedRequiredMin, requiredCapacity?.max, requiredCapacity?.known)
021928:             : missionRequirementsCapacity(derivedRequiredMin, derivedRequiredMax, onSite.known && derivedRequiredMax !== null && derivedRequiredMin === derivedRequiredMax);

021930:         const fulfilledMax = onSite.max === null || responding.max === null || selected.max === null
021931:             ? null
021932:             : onSite.max + responding.max + selected.max;
021933:         const covered = required.max !== null && fulfilledMin >= required.max;
021934:         const definitelyOpen = !covered && fulfilledMax !== null && fulfilledMax < required.min;

021925:         const derivedRequiredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : missing + onSite.max;

021927:             ? missionRequirementsCapacity(requiredCapacity?.min ?? requiredCapacity?.value ?? derivedRequiredMin, requiredCapacity?.max, requiredCapacity?.known)

021931:             ? null

021919:     function missionRequirementsCoverageRow(requirement, selectedCapacity, respondingCapacity, onSiteCapacity = null, requiredCapacity = null) {
021920:         const missing = Math.max(0, Number(requirement?.missing) || 0);
021921:         const selected = missionRequirementsCapacity(selectedCapacity?.min ?? selectedCapacity?.value ?? 0, selectedCapacity?.max, selectedCapacity?.known);
021922:         const responding = missionRequirementsCapacity(respondingCapacity?.min ?? respondingCapacity?.value ?? 0, respondingCapacity?.max, respondingCapacity?.known);
021923:         const onSite = missionRequirementsCapacity(onSiteCapacity?.min ?? onSiteCapacity?.value ?? 0, onSiteCapacity?.max, onSiteCapacity?.known);
021924:         const derivedRequiredMin = missing + onSite.min;
021925:         const derivedRequiredMax = onSite.max === null ? null : missing + onSite.max;
021926:         const required = requiredCapacity
021927:             ? missionRequirementsCapacity(requiredCapacity?.min ?? requiredCapacity?.value ?? derivedRequiredMin, requiredCapacity?.max, requiredCapacity?.known)
021928:             : missionRequirementsCapacity(derivedRequiredMin, derivedRequiredMax, onSite.known && derivedRequiredMax !== null && derivedRequiredMin === derivedRequiredMax);

021931:             ? null
021932:             : onSite.max + responding.max + selected.max;

021934:         const definitelyOpen = !covered && fulfilledMax !== null && fulfilledMax < required.min;
021935:         const uncertain = !covered && !definitelyOpen;

021904:     function missionRequirementsCapacity(min = 0, max = min, known = null) {
021905:         const safeMin = Math.max(0, Number(min) || 0);
021906:         let safeMax = max === null || max === undefined ? null : Math.max(safeMin, Number(max) || 0);
021907:         if (safeMax !== null && !Number.isFinite(safeMax)) safeMax = null;
021908:         const exact = known === true ? true : known === false ? false : safeMax !== null && safeMin === safeMax;
021909:         return { min: safeMin, max: safeMax, known: exact, value: safeMin };
021910:     }

021912:     function missionRequirementsCapacityText(capacity) {
021913:         const value = missionRequirementsCapacity(capacity?.min ?? capacity?.value ?? 0, capacity?.max, capacity?.known);
021914:         if (value.known || value.max === value.min) return value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB');
021915:         if (value.max === null) return value.min > 0 ? `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}+` : '?';
021916:         return `${value.min.toLocaleString('en-GB')}–${value.max.toLocaleString('en-GB')}`;
021917:     }

021780:     function installMissionValueWindows() {
021781:         if (!missionValueFeatureInstalled) {
021782:         missionValueFeatureInstalled = true;
021783:         runtimeOnCleanup(() => {
021784:             runtimeClearTimeout(missionValueScanTimer);
021785:             missionValueScanTimer = null;
021786:             clearMissionValueIndicators();
021787:             clearMissionValueDocumentStyles();
021788:         });
021789:         }
021790:         for (const context of transportSweepDocumentContexts()) observeMissionValueDocument(context.doc);
021791:         scheduleMissionValueScan(0);
021792:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 180);
021793:         runtimeSetTimeout(() => scheduleMissionValueScan(0), 800);
021794:     }

022732:     function missionRequirementsCataloguePanelHtml(catalogue) {
022733:         const rows = Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []);
022734:         const stale = catalogue?.stale === true;
022735:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => `<tr data-row-state="unresolved"><td>${escapeHtml(row.requirement)}</td><td data-label="Catalogue baseline">${escapeHtml(row.baselineText || String(row.baseline ?? row.missing ?? '?'))}</td></tr>`).join('');
022736:         const unresolved = Array.from(catalogue?.unresolved || []);
022737:         const unresolvedHtml = unresolved.length ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unmapped catalogue entries</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(`${item.label}: ${item.value}`)}</span>`).join('')}</div>` : '';
022738:         const note = stale
022739:             ? 'Using a cached official catalogue baseline because the latest catalogue request failed. Current outstanding requirements are unavailable.'
022740:             : 'Official MissionChief catalogue baseline only. Current outstanding requirements are unavailable, so do not treat these quantities as still needed.';
022741:         const title = missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(catalogue?.title || '', 100);
022742:         const summary = `${stale ? 'Cached ' : ''}official baseline${title ? ` · ${title}` : ''}`;
022743:         const table = rows.length
022744:             ? `<table aria-label="MissionChief catalogue baseline requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Catalogue baseline</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>`
022745:             : '<div class="mcms-req-fallback"><span class="mcms-req-fallback-message">The official catalogue lists no fixed vehicle or personnel requirements for this mission.</span></div>';
022746:         return {
022747:             stateName: 'warning',
022748:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
022749:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body">${table}<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Baseline planning data</b><span>${escapeHtml(note)}</span></div>${unresolvedHtml}</div>`
022750:         };
022751:     }

022753:     function missionRequirementsCatalogueDiagnosticLines(record, parsed) {
022754:         const descriptor = record?.catalogueDescriptor || missionRequirementsCatalogueDescriptor(record?.candidate);
022755:         const catalogue = record?.catalogue;
022756:         const comparison = missionRequirementsCatalogueCompare(parsed, catalogue);
022757:         const rows = Array.from(catalogue?.requirements || []).slice(0, 24).map(item => `  - ${item.requirement}: ${item.baselineText || item.baseline || item.missing}`);

022759:             '### Official MissionChief catalogue',
022760:             `- State: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(record?.catalogueState || 'not requested', 40)}`,
022761:             `- Definition ID: ${descriptor?.id ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
022762:             `- Overlay index: ${descriptor?.overlayIndex ?? 'None'}`,
022763:             `- Path: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(descriptor?.path || '', 180) || 'Unavailable'}`,
022764:             `- Catalogue title: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(catalogue?.title || '', 140) || 'Unavailable'}`,
022765:             `- Parsed catalogue rows: ${catalogue?.requirements?.length || 0}`,
022766:             `- Unmapped catalogue rows: ${catalogue?.unresolved?.length || 0}`,
022767:             `- Average credits: ${catalogue?.averageCredits ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
022768:             `- Max patients: ${catalogue?.maxPatients ?? 'Unavailable'}`,
022769:             `- Mission variations: ${catalogue?.variations?.length || 0}`,
022770:             `- Live/catalogue comparison: ${missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(comparison.summary, 500)}`,
022771:             ...(rows.length ? ['', 'Catalogue requirement summary:', ...rows] : []),
--- lines 23185-23229 (match 23207) ---
023185:         const summary = stateName === 'success'
023186:             ? `All ${rows.length} covered`
023187:             : stateName === 'warning'
023188:                 ? `${uncertain} need confirmation · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`
023189:                 : `${definiteOutstanding} outstanding · ${fulfilled}/${rows.length} covered`;
023190:         const rowHtml = rows.map(row => {
023191:             const rowState = row.covered ? 'covered' : row.uncertain ? 'unresolved' : row.partial ? 'partial' : 'open';
023192:             const prefix = row.covered ? '✓ ' : '';
023193:             const requiredText = row.requiredText || (Number.isFinite(Number(row.missing)) ? Number(row.missing).toLocaleString('en-GB') : '?');
023194:             const onSiteText = row.onSiteText || '?';
023195:             const respondingText = row.respondingText || row.enRouteText || '?';
023196:             const selectedText = row.selectedText || '?';
023197:             const stillText = row.stillNeededText || '?';
023198:             const status = row.covered ? 'fulfilled' : row.uncertain ? 'requires confirmation' : row.partial ? 'partially fulfilled' : 'outstanding';
023199:             return `<tr data-row-state="${rowState}" title="${escapeHtml(`${row.requirement}: ${status}`)}"><td>${escapeHtml(prefix + row.requirement)}</td><td data-label="Required">${escapeHtml(requiredText)}</td><td data-label="On site">${escapeHtml(onSiteText)}</td><td data-label="Respond.">${escapeHtml(respondingText)}</td><td data-label="Selected">${escapeHtml(selectedText)}</td><td class="mcms-req-still" data-label="Need">${escapeHtml(stillText)}</td></tr>`;
023200:         }).join('');
023201:         const unknownHtml = unresolved.length
023202:             ? `<div class="mcms-req-unknown"><b>Unresolved MissionChief requirement</b>${unresolved.map(item => `<span>${escapeHtml(item.text)}</span>`).join('')}<button type="button" class="mcms-req-report" data-mcms-report-mission>Report Mission</button></div>`
023203:             : '';
023204:         return {
023205:             stateName,
023206:             widthMode: missionRequirementsWidthMode(rows, unresolved),
023207:             html: `<div class="mcms-req-head"><div class="mcms-req-title"><i aria-hidden="true"></i><span>Mission Requirements</span></div><span class="mcms-req-summary">${escapeHtml(summary)}</span><button type="button" class="mcms-req-collapse" data-mcms-requirements-collapse aria-label="Collapse mission requirements" aria-expanded="true">⌃</button></div><div class="mcms-req-body"><table aria-label="Live mission requirements"><colgroup><col class="mcms-req-name-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"><col class="mcms-req-number-col"></colgroup><thead><tr><th scope="col">Requirement</th><th scope="col">Required</th><th scope="col">On site</th><th scope="col">Responding</th><th scope="col">Selected</th><th scope="col">Still needed</th></tr></thead><tbody>${rowHtml}</tbody></table>${unknownHtml}</div>`

023209:     }
023210: 
023211:     function missionRequirementsSafeDiagnostic(value, limit = 600) {
023212:         let text = Array.from(String(value ?? ''), ch => { const code = ch.charCodeAt(0); return code < 32 || code === 127 ? ' ' : ch; }).join('').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim();
023213:         text = text
023214:             .replace(/https?:\/\/(?:discord(?:app)?\.com\/api\/webhooks|[^\s/]+\/webhooks)\/\S+/gi, '[redacted webhook]')
023215:             .replace(/\b(?:csrf|authenticity|authorization|session|cookie|token|password|secret|api[_-]?key)\b\s*[:=]\s*[^\s,;]+/gi, match => `${match.split(/[:=]/)[0]}: [redacted]`)
023216:             .replace(/\b[A-Z0-9._%+-]+@[A-Z0-9.-]+\.[A-Z]{2,}\b/gi, '[redacted email]')
023217:             .replace(/-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}\s*[,/]\s*-?\d{1,3}\.\d{4,}/g, '[redacted coordinates]');
023218:         return text.slice(0, Math.max(0, limit));
023219:     }
023220: 
023221:     function missionRequirementsTypeSummary(units) {
023222:         const counts = new Map();
023223:         for (const unit of units || []) if (Number.isFinite(unit?.typeId) && unit.typeId >= 0) counts.set(unit.typeId, (counts.get(unit.typeId) || 0) + 1);
023224:         return Array.from(counts.entries()).sort((a, b) => a[0] - b[0]).map(([type, count]) => `${type}×${count}`).join(', ') || 'None detected';
023225:     }

023318:         record.panel.dataset.widthMode = presentation.widthMode || 'standard';
023319:         if (reason) record.panel.dataset.mcmsReportReason = reason;
023320:         else delete record.panel.dataset.mcmsReportReason;
023321:         setInnerHtmlIfChanged(record.panel, presentation.html);

023324:             const expanded = !record.panel.classList.contains('mcms-collapsed');
023325:             collapse.setAttribute('aria-expanded', String(expanded));
023326:             collapse.setAttribute('aria-label', expanded ? 'Collapse mission requirements' : 'Expand mission requirements');
023327:             collapse.textContent = expanded ? '⌃' : '⌄';
023328:         }
023329:     }

023381:         record.frame = runtimeRequestAnimationFrame(() => {

023383:             missionRequirementsRenderRecord(record);
023384:         });
023385:     }

023408:                 record.catalogueDescriptor = null;
023409:                 record.catalogueState = 'idle';

014449:     function isTouchLayoutActive() {
014450:         return tabletModeActive || mobileModeActive;
014451:     }
014452: 
014453:     function deviceLayoutStatusText() {
014454:         const { width, height, orientation } = getViewportMetrics();
014455:         const mobileLabel = state.mobileMode === 'auto' ? 'Mobile auto' : state.mobileMode === 'on' ? 'Mobile forced on' : 'Mobile forced off';
014456:         const tabletLabel = state.tabletMode === 'auto' ? 'Tablet auto' : state.tabletMode === 'on' ? 'Tablet forced on' : 'Tablet forced off';
014457:         const activeLabel = activeDeviceLayout === 'mobile' ? 'iOS mobile layout active' : activeDeviceLayout === 'tablet' ? 'tablet layout active' : 'desktop layout active';
014458:         return `${activeLabel} · ${mobileLabel} · ${tabletLabel} · ${Math.round(width)}×${Math.round(height)} ${orientation}`;
014459:     }
014460: 
014461:     function tabletModeStatusText() {
014462:         return deviceLayoutStatusText();
014463:     }
014464: 
014465:     function refreshTabletModeUi(panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) {
014466:         if (!panel) return;
014467:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-tablet-active', tabletModeActive);
014468:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-mobile-active', mobileModeActive);
014469:         const tabletSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="tablet-mode"]');
014470:         const mobileSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="mobile-mode"]');
014471:         if (tabletSelect && document.activeElement !== tabletSelect) tabletSelect.value = state.tabletMode;
014472:         if (mobileSelect && document.activeElement !== mobileSelect) mobileSelect.value = state.mobileMode;
014473:         const status = panel.querySelector('[data-device-layout-status], [data-tablet-status]');
014474:         if (status) status.textContent = tabletModeStatusText();
014475:         const dragHandle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-drag-handle');
014476:         const title = panel.querySelector('.mcms-title');
014477:         const subtitle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-subtitle');
014478:         const touchLayout = isTouchLayoutActive();
014479:         const layoutName = mobileModeActive ? 'MOBILE COMMAND PANEL' : tabletModeActive ? 'TABLET COMMAND PANEL' : '☰ DRAG MENU HERE';
014480:         const layoutHelp = mobileModeActive
014481:         ? 'iPhone Safari layout · swipe vertically · close with ×'
014482:         : tabletModeActive
014483:             ? 'Touch-optimised layout · scroll vertically · close with ×'
014484:             : 'Hold left-click on this title area. Position saves.';
014485:         if (dragHandle) dragHandle.title = touchLayout ? `${mobileModeActive ? 'Mobile' : 'Tablet'} Mode uses a fixed responsive panel` : 'Hold left-click and drag this bar to move the menu';
014486:         if (title) title.textContent = layoutName;
014487:         if (subtitle) subtitle.textContent = layoutHelp;
014488:     }

014448:

014452: 
014453:     function deviceLayoutStatusText() {
014454:         const { width, height, orientation } = getViewportMetrics();
014455:         const mobileLabel = state.mobileMode === 'auto' ? 'Mobile auto' : state.mobileMode === 'on' ? 'Mobile forced on' : 'Mobile forced off';
014456:         const tabletLabel = state.tabletMode === 'auto' ? 'Tablet auto' : state.tabletMode === 'on' ? 'Tablet forced on' : 'Tablet forced off';
014457:         const activeLabel = activeDeviceLayout === 'mobile' ? 'iOS mobile layout active' : activeDeviceLayout === 'tablet' ? 'tablet layout active' : 'desktop layout active';
014458:         return `${activeLabel} · ${mobileLabel} · ${tabletLabel} · ${Math.round(width)}×${Math.round(height)} ${orientation}`;
014459:     }
014460: 
014461:     function tabletModeStatusText() {
014462:         return deviceLayoutStatusText();
014463:     }
014464: 
014465:     function refreshTabletModeUi(panel = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.panelId)) {
014466:         if (!panel) return;
014467:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-tablet-active', tabletModeActive);
014468:         panel.classList.toggle('mcms-mobile-active', mobileModeActive);
014469:         const tabletSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="tablet-mode"]');
014470:         const mobileSelect = panel.querySelector('[data-setting="mobile-mode"]');
014471:         if (tabletSelect && document.activeElement !== tabletSelect) tabletSelect.value = state.tabletMode;
014472:         if (mobileSelect && document.activeElement !== mobileSelect) mobileSelect.value = state.mobileMode;
014473:         const status = panel.querySelector('[data-device-layout-status], [data-tablet-status]');
014474:         if (status) status.textContent = tabletModeStatusText();
014475:         const dragHandle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-drag-handle');
014476:         const title = panel.querySelector('.mcms-title');
014477:         const subtitle = panel.querySelector('.mcms-subtitle');
014478:         const touchLayout = isTouchLayoutActive();
014479:         const layoutName = mobileModeActive ? 'MOBILE COMMAND PANEL' : tabletModeActive ? 'TABLET COMMAND PANEL' : '☰ DRAG MENU HERE';
014480:         const layoutHelp = mobileModeActive
014481:         ? 'iPhone Safari layout · swipe vertically · close with ×'
014482:         : tabletModeActive
014483:             ? 'Touch-optimised layout · scroll vertically · close with ×'
014484:             : 'Hold left-click on this title area. Position saves.';
014485:         if (dragHandle) dragHandle.title = touchLayout ? `${mobileModeActive ? 'Mobile' : 'Tablet'} Mode uses a fixed responsive panel` : 'Hold left-click and drag this bar to move the menu';
014486:         if (title) title.textContent = layoutName;
014487:         if (subtitle) subtitle.textContent = layoutHelp;
014488:     }
014489: 
014490:     function clearTabletDockSizing(control = document.getElementById(SCRIPT.controlId)) {
014491:         if (control) {
014492:         control.style.removeProperty('--mcms-tablet-dock-width');
--- lines 24849-24893 (match 24871) ---
024849:         missionSpawnPrimeTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => { missionSpawnArmed = true; }, 5000);
024850:     }
024851: 
024852:     function clonePlainData(value) {
024853:         return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(value));
024854:     }
024855: 
024856:     function currentMapViewSnapshot() {
024857:         const map = findLeafletMapInstance(false);
024858:         try {
024859:             const centre = map?.getCenter?.();
024860:             const zoom = map?.getZoom?.();
024861:             if (centre && Number.isFinite(Number(zoom))) return { lat: Number(centre.lat), lng: Number(centre.lng), zoom: Number(zoom) };
024862:         } catch (err) {}
024863:         return null;
024864:     }
024865: 
024866:     function buildMapProfile(name) {
024867:         return {
024868:             name: String(name || 'Map Profile').slice(0, 40),
024869:             savedAt: Date.now(),
024870:             mapView: currentMapViewSnapshot(),
024871:             settings: clonePlainData({
024872:                 theme: state.theme,
024873:                 markerFocus: state.markerFocus,
024874:                 missionPulse: state.missionPulse,
024875:                 roadPriority: state.roadPriority,
024876:                 visibility: state.visibility,
024877:                 allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
024878:                 missionAge: state.missionAge,
024879:                 unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
024880:                 transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
024881:                 missionInspector: state.missionInspector,
024882:                 stuckDetector: state.stuckDetector,
024883:                 missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn,
024884:                 resourceGap: state.resourceGap,
024885:                 coverage: state.coverage,
024886:                 heatmap: state.heatmap
024887:             })
024888:         };
024889:     }
024890: 
024891:     function renderProfiles() {
024892:         const list = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-profile-list]`);
024893:         if (!list) return;
--- lines 24876-24920 (match 24898) ---
024876:                 visibility: state.visibility,
024877:                 allianceCredits: state.allianceCredits,
024878:                 missionAge: state.missionAge,
024879:                 unitCommitment: state.unitCommitment,
024880:                 transportWatcher: state.transportWatcher,
024881:                 missionInspector: state.missionInspector,
024882:                 stuckDetector: state.stuckDetector,
024883:                 missionSpawn: state.missionSpawn,
024884:                 resourceGap: state.resourceGap,
024885:                 coverage: state.coverage,
024886:                 heatmap: state.heatmap
024887:             })
024888:         };
024889:     }
024890: 
024891:     function renderProfiles() {
024892:         const list = document.querySelector(`#${SCRIPT.panelId} [data-profile-list]`);
024893:         if (!list) return;
024894:         list.innerHTML = state.profiles.map((profile, index) => {
024895:             if (!profile) {
024896:                 return `<div class="mcms-profile-row"><div class="mcms-profile-main"><strong>Slot ${index + 1}</strong><span>Empty profile</span></div><span></span><button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="profile-save" data-slot="${index}">Save</button><span></span></div>`;
024897:             }
024898:             const detail = `${THEMES[profile.settings?.theme]?.label || 'Map'} · ${profile.mapView ? `Z${profile.mapView.zoom}` : 'No view'}`;
024899:             return `<div class="mcms-profile-row">
024900:                 <div class="mcms-profile-main"><strong>${escapeHtml(profile.name || `Profile ${index + 1}`)}</strong><span>${escapeHtml(detail)}</span></div>
024901:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="profile-load" data-slot="${index}">Go</button>
024902:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="profile-save" data-slot="${index}">Save</button>
024903:                 <button class="mcms-small-btn" type="button" data-action="profile-delete" data-slot="${index}">×</button>
024904:             </div>`;
024905:         }).join('');
024906:     }
024907: 
024908:     function saveMapProfile(slot) {
024909:         if (!Number.isInteger(slot) || slot < 0 || slot >= MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) return;
024910:         const existing = state.profiles[slot];
024911:         const name = pageWindow.prompt('Profile name:', existing?.name || `Profile ${slot + 1}`);
024912:         if (name === null) return;
024913:         state.profiles[slot] = buildMapProfile(name.trim() || `Profile ${slot + 1}`);
024914:         saveState();
024915:         renderProfiles();
024916:         showToast(`Saved ${state.profiles[slot].name}`);
024917:     }
024918: 
024919:     function applyLoadedConfiguration() {
024920:         criticalViewActive = false;
--- lines 24927-24971 (match 24949) ---
024927:         vehicleStatus?.classList.remove('mcms-open');
024928:         vehicleStatus?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
024929:         hideMissionInspector();
024930:         missionSpawnArmed = false;
024931:         runtimeClearTimeout(missionSpawnPrimeTimer);
024932:         knownMissionIds.clear();
024933:         if (state.missionSpawn.enabled) primeMissionSpawnDetector();
024934:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
024935:         else stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
024936:         applyRootAttributes();
024937:         renderQuickPlaces();
024938:         renderBookmarks();
024939:         renderProfiles();
024940:         renderScreenPins();
024941:         updateUI();
024942:         synchroniseVehicleMarkerClasses();
024943:         synchronisePersonalBuildingVisibility();
024944:         reconcileFeatureRefreshes({ includeSnapshots: missionSnapshotsNeeded(), positionPanel: true });
024945:     }
024946: 
024947:     function loadMapProfile(slot) {
024948:         const profile = state.profiles[slot];
024949:         if (!profile?.settings) return;
024950:         const settings = profile.settings;
024951:         state.theme = normaliseTheme(settings.theme);
024952:         state.markerFocus = Boolean(settings.markerFocus);
024953:         state.missionPulse = Boolean(settings.missionPulse);
024954:         state.roadPriority = Boolean(settings.roadPriority);
024955:         state.visibility = { ...state.visibility, ...(settings.visibility || {}) };
024956:         state.allianceCredits = Boolean(settings.allianceCredits);
024957:         state.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(settings.allianceCreditMinimum)) ? Number(settings.allianceCreditMinimum) : state.allianceCreditMinimum;
024958:         state.missionAge = Boolean(settings.missionAge);
024959:         state.unitCommitment = Boolean(settings.unitCommitment);
024960:         state.transportWatcher = settings.transportWatcher !== false;
024961:         state.missionInspector = settings.missionInspector !== false;
024962:         state.stuckDetector = { ...state.stuckDetector, ...(settings.stuckDetector || {}) };
024963:         state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
024964:         state.missionSpawn = { ...state.missionSpawn, ...(settings.missionSpawn || {}) };
024965:         state.resourceGap = { ...state.resourceGap, ...(settings.resourceGap || {}) };
024966:         state.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(state.resourceGap.radiusMi)) ? Number(state.resourceGap.radiusMi) : 25;
024967:         state.coverage = { ...state.coverage, ...(settings.coverage || {}) };
024968:         state.heatmap = { ...state.heatmap, ...(settings.heatmap || {}) };
024969:         saveState();
024970:         applyLoadedConfiguration();
024971:         if (profile.mapView) runtimeSetTimeout(() => setMapView(profile.mapView.lat, profile.mapView.lng, profile.mapView.zoom), 180);
--- lines 24928-24972 (match 24950) ---
024928:         vehicleStatus?.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
024929:         hideMissionInspector();
024930:         missionSpawnArmed = false;

024932:         knownMissionIds.clear();

024934:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();

024970:         applyLoadedConfiguration();
024971:         if (profile.mapView) runtimeSetTimeout(() => setMapView(profile.mapView.lat, profile.mapView.lng, profile.mapView.zoom), 180);
024972:         showToast(`Loaded ${profile.name || `Profile ${slot + 1}`}`);
024973:     }

024976:         if (!state.profiles[slot]) return;
--- lines 24933-24977 (match 24955) ---

024934:         if (state.autoLoadAllVehicles) installAutoLoadAllVehicles();
024935:         else stopAutoLoadAllVehicles();
024936:         applyRootAttributes();

024946: 
024947:     function loadMapProfile(slot) {
024948:         const profile = state.profiles[slot];
024949:         if (!profile?.settings) return;
024950:         const settings = profile.settings;
024951:         state.theme = normaliseTheme(settings.theme);
024952:         state.markerFocus = Boolean(settings.markerFocus);
024953:         state.missionPulse = Boolean(settings.missionPulse);
024954:         state.roadPriority = Boolean(settings.roadPriority);
024955:         state.visibility = { ...state.visibility, ...(settings.visibility || {}) };
024956:         state.allianceCredits = Boolean(settings.allianceCredits);
024957:         state.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(settings.allianceCreditMinimum)) ? Number(settings.allianceCreditMinimum) : state.allianceCreditMinimum;
024958:         state.missionAge = Boolean(settings.missionAge);
024959:         state.unitCommitment = Boolean(settings.unitCommitment);
024960:         state.transportWatcher = settings.transportWatcher !== false;
024961:         state.missionInspector = settings.missionInspector !== false;
024962:         state.stuckDetector = { ...state.stuckDetector, ...(settings.stuckDetector || {}) };
024963:         state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
024964:         state.missionSpawn = { ...state.missionSpawn, ...(settings.missionSpawn || {}) };
024965:         state.resourceGap = { ...state.resourceGap, ...(settings.resourceGap || {}) };
024966:         state.resourceGap.radiusMi = RESOURCE_GAP_RADIUS_OPTIONS.includes(Number(state.resourceGap.radiusMi)) ? Number(state.resourceGap.radiusMi) : 25;
024967:         state.coverage = { ...state.coverage, ...(settings.coverage || {}) };
024968:         state.heatmap = { ...state.heatmap, ...(settings.heatmap || {}) };
024969:         saveState();
024970:         applyLoadedConfiguration();
024971:         if (profile.mapView) runtimeSetTimeout(() => setMapView(profile.mapView.lat, profile.mapView.lng, profile.mapView.zoom), 180);
024972:         showToast(`Loaded ${profile.name || `Profile ${slot + 1}`}`);
024973:     }

024956:         state.allianceCredits = Boolean(settings.allianceCredits);
024957:         state.allianceCreditMinimum = [0, 5000, 10000, 15000, 20000].includes(Number(settings.allianceCreditMinimum)) ? Number(settings.allianceCreditMinimum) : state.allianceCreditMinimum;
024958:         state.missionAge = Boolean(settings.missionAge);
024959:         state.unitCommitment = Boolean(settings.unitCommitment);
024960:         state.transportWatcher = settings.transportWatcher !== false;
024961:         state.missionInspector = settings.missionInspector !== false;
024962:         state.stuckDetector = { ...state.stuckDetector, ...(settings.stuckDetector || {}) };
024963:         state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin = Math.round(clamp(state.stuckDetector.thresholdMin, STUCK_MIN_MINUTES, STUCK_MAX_MINUTES, 20));
024964:         state.missionSpawn = { ...state.missionSpawn, ...(settings.missionSpawn || {}) };

024967:         state.coverage = { ...state.coverage, ...(settings.coverage || {}) };

024970:         applyLoadedConfiguration();

024972:         showToast(`Loaded ${profile.name || `Profile ${slot + 1}`}`);

001397:     function normaliseLoadedState(parsed, base = defaultState()) {
001398:         const merged = {
001399:         ...base,
001400:         ...parsed,
001401:         nudge: { ...base.nudge, ...(parsed.nudge || {}) },
001402:         visibility: { ...base.visibility, ...(parsed.visibility || {}) },
001403:         quickPins: { ...base.quickPins, ...(parsed.quickPins || {}) },
001404:         coverage: { ...base.coverage, ...(parsed.coverage || {}) },
001405:         heatmap: { ...base.heatmap, ...(parsed.heatmap || {}) },
001406:         stuckDetector: { ...base.stuckDetector, ...(parsed.stuckDetector || {}) },
001407:         missionSpawn: { ...base.missionSpawn, ...(parsed.missionSpawn || {}) },
001408:         resourceGap: { ...base.resourceGap, ...(parsed.resourceGap || {}) },
001409:         transportSweep: { ...base.transportSweep, ...(parsed.transportSweep || {}) },
001410:         majorIncidentFeed: { ...base.majorIncidentFeed, ...(parsed.majorIncidentFeed || {}) },
001411:         missionAgeWatch: { ...base.missionAgeWatch, ...(parsed.missionAgeWatch || {}) },
001412:         payoutFlash: { ...base.payoutFlash, ...(parsed.payoutFlash || {}) },
001413:         discordReport: { ...base.discordReport, ...(parsed.discordReport || {}) },
001414:         financialVault: { ...base.financialVault, ...(parsed.financialVault || {}) },
001415:         autoNight: { ...base.autoNight, ...(parsed.autoNight || {}) },
001416:         profiles: Array.isArray(parsed.profiles) ? parsed.profiles.slice(0, MAP_PROFILE_LIMIT) : base.profiles,
001417:         bookmarks: Array.isArray(parsed.bookmarks) ? parsed.bookmarks.slice(0, 5) : base.bookmarks
001418:         };

001493:         delete merged.discordReport.includeBenchmark;
001494:         merged.autoNight.nightTheme = normaliseTheme(merged.autoNight.nightTheme);
001495:         merged.autoNight.dayTheme = normaliseTheme(merged.autoNight.dayTheme);
001496:         merged.bookmarks = merged.bookmarks.map(item => item ? {
001497:         ...item,
001498:         name: String(item.name || 'Bookmark').trim().slice(0, 80) || 'Bookmark',
001499:         shortLabel: sanitiseBookmarkShortLabel(item.shortLabel || ''),
001500:         pinned: Boolean(item.pinned)
001501:         } : null);
001502:         merged.profiles = merged.profiles.map(item => item && typeof item === 'object' ? item : null);
001503: 
001504:         if (!merged.panelPosition || !Number.isFinite(Number(merged.panelPosition.left)) || !Number.isFinite(Number(merged.panelPosition.top))) {
001505:         merged.panelPosition = null;
001506:         } else {
001507:         merged.panelPosition = { left: Number(merged.panelPosition.left), top: Number(merged.panelPosition.top) };
001508:         }
001509: 
001510:         delete merged.requiresAttention;
001511:         return merged;
001512:     }
001513: 
001514:     function loadState() {
001515:         const base = defaultState();
001516:         const raw = localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) || SCRIPT.oldStorageKeys.map(key => localStorage.getItem(key)).find(Boolean);
001517:         if (!raw) return base;
001518: 
001519:         try {
001520:         return normaliseLoadedState(JSON.parse(raw), base);
001521:         } catch (err) {
001522:         return base;
001523:         }
001524:     }
001525: 
001526:     function saveState() {
001527:         try {
001528:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.storageState, JSON.stringify(state));
001529:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyTheme, state.theme);
001530:         localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.legacyPosition, state.position);
001531:         } catch (err) {}
001532:     }

001543:     function normaliseUiTheme(key) {
001544:         return UI_THEMES[key] ? key : 'mapCommand';
001545:     }
001546: 
001547:     function applyUiTheme(key, announce = false) {
001548:         const nextTheme = normaliseUiTheme(key);
001549:         const changed = state.uiTheme !== nextTheme;
001550:         const pairedHyrulePayout = nextTheme === 'hyrule' && state.payoutFlash.template !== 'hyruleQuest';
001551:         state.uiTheme = nextTheme;
001552:         if (pairedHyrulePayout) state.payoutFlash.template = 'hyruleQuest';
001553:         saveState();
001554:         updateUI();
001555:         if (announce && changed) {
001556:         showToast(pairedHyrulePayout
001557:             ? 'Hyrule Command interface and Quest Reward payout active'
--- lines 1543-1587 (match 1565) ---
001543:     function normaliseUiTheme(key) {
001544:         return UI_THEMES[key] ? key : 'mapCommand';
001545:     }
001546: 
001547:     function applyUiTheme(key, announce = false) {
001548:         const nextTheme = normaliseUiTheme(key);
001549:         const changed = state.uiTheme !== nextTheme;
001550:         const pairedHyrulePayout = nextTheme === 'hyrule' && state.payoutFlash.template !== 'hyruleQuest';
001551:         state.uiTheme = nextTheme;
001552:         if (pairedHyrulePayout) state.payoutFlash.template = 'hyruleQuest';
001553:         saveState();
001554:         updateUI();
001555:         if (announce && changed) {
001556:         showToast(pairedHyrulePayout
001557:             ? 'Hyrule Command interface and Quest Reward payout active'
001558:             : `${UI_THEMES[nextTheme].label} interface active`);
001559:         }
001560:     }
001561: 
001562:     function normaliseTheme(key) {
001563:         if (THEMES[key]) return key;
001564:         if (LEGACY_THEME_MAP[key]) return LEGACY_THEME_MAP[key];
001565:         return 'default';
001566:     }
001567: 
001568:     function payoutTemplateMeta(key = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001569:         return PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[key] || PAYOUT_TEMPLATES.gta5;
001570:     }
001571: 
001572:     function buildPayoutTemplateOptions(selected = state?.payoutFlash?.template) {
001573:         return PAYOUT_TEMPLATE_ORDER.map(key => `<option value="${key}"${key === selected ? ' selected' : ''}>${PAYOUT_TEMPLATES[key].label}</option>`).join('');
001574:     }

001806:     function addStyle(css) {
001807:         const style = document.createElement('style');
001808:         style.id = SCRIPT.styleId;
001809:         style.textContent = css;
001810:         const parent = document.head || document.documentElement;
001811:         if (parent) parent.appendChild(style);
001812:         else document.addEventListener('readystatechange', () => (document.head || document.documentElement)?.appendChild(style), { once: true });
001813:     }

016421:         transportWatcherTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(updateTransportWatcherLabels, state.economyMode ? Math.max(900, delay) : delay);

016424:     function transportSweepSleep(ms) {
016425:         return runtimeDelay(ms);
016426:     }

016428:     function transportSweepElementVisible(element) {
016429:         if (!element || !element.isConnected) return false;
016430:         try {
016431:         const view = element.ownerDocument?.defaultView || window;
016432:         const style = view.getComputedStyle(element);
016433:         if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden' || Number(style.opacity) === 0) return false;
016434:         const rect = element.getBoundingClientRect();
016435:         return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0;
016436:         } catch (err) {
016437:         return false;
016438:         }
016439:     }
016440: 
016441:     async function transportSweepWaitFor(test, timeoutMs = 5000, intervalMs = 120) {
016442:         const started = Date.now();
016443:         while (Date.now() - started < timeoutMs) {
016444:         if (runtime.destroyed || transportSweepRuntime.stopRequested) return null;
016445:         try {
016446:             const value = test();
016447:             if (value) return value;
016448:         } catch (err) {}
016449:         if (!await transportSweepSleep(intervalMs)) return null;
016450:         }
016451:         return null;
016452:     }

016601:     function transportSweepReleaseVehicleIdFromHref(href) {
016602:         let pathname = String(href || '').trim();
016603:         try { pathname = new URL(pathname, document.baseURI || pageWindow.location.href).pathname; } catch (err) {}
016604:         const match = pathname.match(/^\/vehicles\/(\d+)\/patient\/-1\/?$/);
016605:         return match ? match[1] : null;
016606:     }

016611:         const href = String(ownerLink?.getAttribute?.('href') || '');
016612:         const match = href.match(/\/profile\/(\d+)(?:\/|$)/);

016616:     function transportSweepAnchorUsable(anchor) {
016617:         if (!anchor || !anchor.isConnected || anchor.closest?.(`#${SCRIPT.panelId}`)) return false;
016618:         try {
016619:             const view = anchor.ownerDocument?.defaultView || window;
016620:             let node = anchor;
016621:             for (let depth = 0; depth < 7 && node; depth += 1, node = node.parentElement) {
016622:                 const style = view.getComputedStyle(node);
016623:             if (style.display === 'none' || style.visibility === 'hidden') continue;
016624:                 const rect = node.getBoundingClientRect();
016625:                 if (rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0) return true;
016626:             }
016627:         } catch (err) {}
016628:         return false;
016629:     }

017068:     function transportSweepWindowLayerChain(root) {
017069:         const chain = [];
017070:         const seen = new Set();
017071:         const collect = start => {
017072:             let node = start;
017073:             while (node?.nodeType === 1) {
017074:                 if (!seen.has(node) && node.matches?.(TRANSPORT_SWEEP_NATIVE_LAYER_SELECTOR)) {
017075:                     seen.add(node);
017076:                     chain.push(node);
017077:                 }
017078:                 node = node.parentElement;
017079:             }
017080:         };
017081:         collect(root);
017082:         try { collect(root?.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement); } catch (err) {}
017083:         return chain;
017084:     }

017089:     }

017091:     function transportSweepOutermostLayer(layers) {
017092:         const candidates = Array.from(layers || []).filter(layer => layer?.isConnected && !transportSweepOverlayLayer(layer));
017093:         return candidates.find(layer => !candidates.some(other => other !== layer && other.contains?.(layer))) || candidates[0] || null;
017094:     }

017095: 
017096:     function transportSweepClaimWindow(root, beforeLayers = null) {
017097:         if (!root?.isConnected) return null;
017098:         const baseline = beforeLayers instanceof Set ? beforeLayers : new Set();
017099:         const anchor = (() => {
017100:             try { return root.ownerDocument?.defaultView?.frameElement || root; } catch (err) { return root; }
017101:         })();
017102:         const chain = transportSweepWindowLayerChain(root);
017103:         const created = transportSweepNativeWindowLayers().filter(layer => {
017104:             if (baseline.has(layer)) return false;
017105:             if (layer === anchor || layer.contains?.(anchor) || anchor.contains?.(layer)) return true;
017106:             return layer.ownerDocument === anchor.ownerDocument && transportSweepOverlayLayer(layer);
017107:         });
017108:         const owned = new Set([...created, ...chain.filter(layer => !baseline.has(layer))]);
017109:         for (const layer of owned) {
017110:             try { layer.dataset.mcmsTransportSweepOwned = '1'; } catch (err) {}
017111:         }
017112:         transportSweepRuntime.ownedWindowLayers = owned;
017113:         transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowCreatedLayer = owned.size > 0;
017114:         transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowRoot = transportSweepOutermostLayer(owned) || transportSweepOutermostLayer(chain) || root;
017115:         return transportSweepRuntime.activeWindowRoot;
017116:     }

019074:     function loadPayoutHistory() {
019075:         try {
019076:         const parsed = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.payoutHistoryState) || '[]');
019077:         if (!Array.isArray(parsed)) return [];

019079:             .slice(0, PAYOUT_HISTORY_LIMIT)
019080:             .map(item => ({
019081:                 id: String(item.id || `${item.timestamp}-${item.amount}`),
019082:                 timestamp: Number(item.timestamp),
019083:                 amount: Math.max(0, Math.round(Number(item.amount))),
019084:                 caption: String(item.caption || ''),
019085:                 source: ['personal', 'alliance', 'unknown'].includes(item.source) ? item.source : 'unknown',
019086:                 tier: ['standard', 'major', 'high', 'elite'].includes(item.tier) ? item.tier : 'standard'
019087:             }));
019088:         } catch (err) { return []; }
019089:     }

019113:         catch (err) {}

026279:     function observeCreditValue() {
026280:         const element = document.querySelector('.credits-value');
026281:         if (!element) return false;
026282:         if (observedCreditsElement === element && creditsValueObserver) return true;
026283:         if (creditsValueObserver) {
026284:             try { creditsValueObserver.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
026285:             runtime.observers.delete(creditsValueObserver);
026286:         }
026287:         observedCreditsElement = element;
026288:         processCreditTotal(element.textContent);
026289:         creditsValueObserver = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(() => processCreditTotal(element.textContent)));
026290:         creditsValueObserver.observe(element, { childList: true, subtree: true, characterData: true });
026291:         return true;

030924:     function installAllianceBuildingsPageOptimisation() {
030925:         const initiallyInContext = isAllianceBuildingsContext();
030926:         const enabled = state.allianceBuildingsMap !== false;
030927:         let renderTimer = null;
030928:         const renderWhenRelevant = () => {
030929:             if (!isAllianceBuildingsContext()) {
030930:                 document.getElementById(ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID)?.remove();
030931:                 document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-map-column'));
030932:                 document.querySelectorAll('.mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column').forEach(element => element.classList.remove('mcms-alliance-buildings-list-column'));
030933:                 clearAllianceBuildingsEarlyContext();
030934:                 return false;
030935:             }
030936:             if (!enabled) optimiseAllianceBuildingsCourseTableEarly();
030937:             return renderAllianceBuildingsMapPreference();
030938:         };
030939:         if (initiallyInContext || !enabled) {
030940:             renderWhenRelevant();
030941:             runtimeSetTimeout(renderWhenRelevant, 40);
030942:             runtimeSetTimeout(renderWhenRelevant, 300);
030943:             runtimeSetTimeout(renderWhenRelevant, 1200);
030944:             const pageObserver = runtimeTrackObserver(new MutationObserver(mutations => {
030945:                 if (!mutations.some(mutation => mutation.addedNodes?.length || mutation.removedNodes?.length)) return;
030946:                 runtimeClearTimeout(renderTimer);
030947:                 renderTimer = runtimeSetTimeout(() => {
030948:                     renderTimer = null;
030949:                     renderWhenRelevant();
030950:                 }, 0);
030951:             }));
030952:             pageObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030953:         }
030954:         runtimeListen(document, 'click', event => {
030955:             const button = closestEventTarget(event, '[data-mcms-alliance-map-toggle]');
030956:             if (!button) return;
030957:             event.preventDefault();
030958:             event.stopPropagation();
030959:             state.allianceBuildingsMap = button.dataset.mcmsAllianceMapToggle === 'restore';
030960:             saveState();
030961:             button.disabled = true;
030962:             button.textContent = 'Reloading…';
030963:             runtimeSetTimeout(() => location.reload(), 120);
030964:         }, true);

030966:             document.getElementById(ALLIANCE_BUILDINGS_MAP_NOTICE_ID)?.remove();

030979:     function connectMainMutationObserver() {
030980:         if (!mainMutationObserver || runtime.destroyed || !document.body) return;
030981:         try { mainMutationObserver.disconnect(); } catch (err) {}
030982:         const roots = new Set();
030983:         const mapElement = getLargestLeafletMap();
030984:         const mapRoot = mapElement?.closest?.('#map_outer') || mapElement?.parentElement || mapElement;
030985:         const missionRoot = document.querySelector('#missions, #mission_list, .missions-panel, .mission-list');
030986:         if (mapRoot?.isConnected) roots.add(mapRoot);
030987:         if (missionRoot?.isConnected) roots.add(missionRoot);
030988:         if (!roots.size) {
030989:             mainMutationObserverFallbackActive = true;
030990:             mainMutationObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030991:             return;
030992:         }
030993:         mainMutationObserverFallbackActive = false;
030994:         for (const root of roots) mainMutationObserver.observe(root, { childList: true, subtree: true });
030995:         mainMutationObserver.observe(document.body, { childList: true, subtree: false });
030996:     }

000177:         const queue = animationQueue;
000178:         animationQueue = [];
000179:         for (const item of queue) item.callback();
000180:     }
000181: };

000398: function makeVehicleElement(doc, vehicleId, typeId, options = {}) {
000399:     const row = new FakeElement('tr', doc);
000400:     const vehicle = new FakeElement('input', doc);
000401:     vehicle.value = String(vehicleId);
000402:     if (options.typeOnRow) row.setAttribute('vehicle_type_id', String(typeId));
000403:     else vehicle.setAttribute('vehicle_type_id', String(typeId));
000404:     if (options.tractiveId !== undefined) vehicle.setAttribute('tractive_vehicle_id', String(options.tractiveId));
000405:     if (options.staff !== undefined) vehicle.setAttribute('data-current-personnel', String(options.staff));
000406:     if (options.equipment) row.setAttribute('data-equipment-types', options.equipment.join(','));
000407:     vehicle.closestMap.set('tr', row);
000408:     row.queryHandler = selector => selector.includes('vehicle_type_id') ? (options.typeOnRow ? null : vehicle) : null;
000409:     row.queryAllHandler = () => [];
000410:     return { row, vehicle };
000411: }

000015: const start = source.indexOf(startMarker);

000019: 
000020: const escapeHtml = value => String(value ?? '')
000021:     .replace(/&/g, '&amp;')
000022:     .replace(/</g, '&lt;')
000023:     .replace(/>/g, '&gt;')
000024:     .replace(/"/g, '&quot;')
000025:     .replace(/'/g, '&#39;');
000026: 
000027: class FakeClassList {
000028:     constructor() { this.values = new Set(); }
000029:     contains(value) { return this.values.has(value); }
000030:     toggle(value, force) {
000031:         const enabled = force === undefined ? !this.values.has(value) : Boolean(force);
000032:         if (enabled) this.values.add(value);
000033:         else this.values.delete(value);
000034:         return enabled;
000035:     }
000036: }
000037: 
000038: class FakeElement {
000039:     constructor(tagName = 'div', ownerDocument = null) {
000040:         this.tagName = String(tagName).toUpperCase();
000041:         this.ownerDocument = ownerDocument;
000042:         this.dataset = {};
000043:         this.attributes = new Map();
000044:         this.classList = new FakeClassList();
000045:         this.children = [];
000046:         this.parentNode = null;

000421: function testImportContracts() {{
000422:     const candidate = {{ theme: "nightshift", position: "tr" }};
000423:     assert.equal(looksLikeToolkitState(candidate), true);
000424:     assert.equal(looksLikeToolkitState([]), false);
000425:     assert.deepEqual(extractImportedToolkitState({{ state: candidate }}), candidate);
000426:     assert.deepEqual(extractImportedToolkitState({{ settings: {{ state: candidate }} }}), candidate);
000427:     assert.deepEqual(extractImportedToolkitState({{ configuration: {{ state: candidate }} }}), candidate);
000428:     assert.deepEqual(extractImportedToolkitState({{ configuration: candidate }}), candidate);

000046: def extract_function(source: str, masked: str, name: str) -> str:
000047:     pattern = re.compile(rf"\b(?:async\s+)?function\s+{re.escape(name)}\s*\(")
000048:     matches = list(pattern.finditer(masked))
000049:     if len(matches) != 1:
000050:         raise AssertionError(f"Expected one declaration for {name}, found {len(matches)}")
000051:     match = matches[0]
000052:     open_pos = masked.find("{", match.start())
000053:     if open_pos < 0:
000054:         raise AssertionError(f"Opening brace not found for {name}")
000055:     close_pos = audit.matching_brace(masked, open_pos)
--- lines 57-89 (match 73) ---
000057:         raise AssertionError(f"Closing brace not found for {name}")
000058:     return source[match.start():close_pos + 1]
000059: 
000060: 
000061: def values(pattern: str, text: str) -> list[str]:
000062:     return sorted(set(re.findall(pattern, text)))
000063: 
000064: 
000065: def assert_static_routes(source: str, fixtures: dict) -> None:
000066:     masked = audit.mask_non_code(source)
000067:     create_panel = extract_function(source, masked, "createPanel")
000068:     handle_action = extract_function(source, masked, "handleAction")
000069:     handle_setting = extract_function(source, masked, "handleSettingChange")
000070:     toggle_feature = extract_function(source, masked, "toggleFeature")
000071: 
000072:     actions = values(r'data-action\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000073:     settings = values(r'data-setting\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000074:     tabs = values(r'data-tab\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000075:     rendered_toggles = sorted(set(
000076:         re.findall(r'makeToggleButton\(\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000077:         + re.findall(r'data-toggle\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000078:     ))
000079:     handled_actions = values(r'action\s*===\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', handle_action)
000080:     handled_settings = values(r'setting\s*===\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', handle_setting)
000081:     toggle_routes = values(r'feature\s*===\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', toggle_feature)
000082:     setting_families = values(r'setting\.startsWith\(\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']\s*\)', handle_setting)
000083: 
000084:     assert actions == sorted(fixtures["actions"]), "Visible data-action inventory changed"
000085:     assert settings == sorted(fixtures["settings"]), "Visible data-setting inventory changed"
000086:     assert tabs == sorted(fixtures["tabs"]), "Panel tab inventory changed"
000087:     assert handled_actions == sorted(fixtures["actions"] + fixtures["dynamicActions"]), "Action routing inventory changed"
000088:     assert toggle_routes == sorted(fixtures["toggleRoutes"]), "Feature toggle routing inventory changed"
000089:     assert setting_families == sorted(fixtures["settingFamilies"]), "Setting-family routing changed"

000328: function testStateMigration() {{
000329:     resetEnvironment();
000330:     assertDefaultShape(loadState());
000331: 
000332:     const directInput = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(fixtures.legacyMigration));
000333:     const directInputBefore = JSON.stringify(directInput);
000334:     const directBase = defaultState();
000335:     const directBaseBefore = JSON.stringify(directBase);
000336:     const directMigrated = normaliseLoadedState(directInput, directBase);
000337:     assert.equal(JSON.stringify(directInput), directInputBefore, "normalization must not mutate parsed settings");
000338:     assert.equal(JSON.stringify(directBase), directBaseBefore, "normalization must not mutate default settings");
000339:     assert.equal(directMigrated.activeTab, "resources");
000340:     assert.equal(directMigrated.visibility.buildings, true);

000348:

000351:     const migrated = loadState();
000352:     assert.deepEqual(migrated, directMigrated, "loadState must preserve direct normalization output");
000353:     assert.equal(migrated.uiTheme, "mapCommand");

000327: 
000328: function testStateMigration() {{
000329:     resetEnvironment();
000330:     assertDefaultShape(loadState());
000331: 
000332:     const directInput = JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(fixtures.legacyMigration));
000333:     const directInputBefore = JSON.stringify(directInput);
000334:     const directBase = defaultState();
000335:     const directBaseBefore = JSON.stringify(directBase);
000336:     const directMigrated = normaliseLoadedState(directInput, directBase);
000337:     assert.equal(JSON.stringify(directInput), directInputBefore, "normalization must not mutate parsed settings");
000338:     assert.equal(JSON.stringify(directBase), directBaseBefore, "normalization must not mutate default settings");
000339:     assert.equal(directMigrated.activeTab, "resources");

000464: async function testToggleContracts() {{
000465:     for (const [feature, path] of Object.entries(fixtures.toggleStatePaths)) {{
000466:         resetEnvironment();
000467:         const before = pathValue(state, path);
000468:         toggleFeature(feature);
000469:         await Promise.resolve();
000470:         await Promise.resolve();
000471:         const after = pathValue(state, path);
000472:         assert.notEqual(after, before, `${{feature}} did not toggle ${{path}}`);
000473:         assert.equal(localStorage.getItem(SCRIPT.storageState) !== null, true, `${{feature}} did not persist state`);
000474:         assert.equal(wasCalled("updateUI"), true, `${{feature}} did not request UI synchronization`);

000611:             ["node", str(harness_path)],

000613:             text=True,
000614:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
000615:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
000616:             check=False,
000617:             env={**os.environ, "TZ": "Europe/London"},
000618:         )
000619:     print(completed.stdout, end="")
000620:     if completed.returncode != 0:
000621:         raise SystemExit(completed.returncode)

000602: def main() -> int:
000603:     source = SOURCE.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
000604:     fixtures = json.loads(FIXTURES.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
000605:     assert_static_routes(source, fixtures)
000606:     harness = build_harness(source, fixtures)
000607:     with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="missionchief-settings-ui-contract-") as temporary:
000608:         harness_path = Path(temporary) / "settings-ui-contract.cjs"
000609:         harness_path.write_text(harness, encoding="utf-8")
000610:         completed = subprocess.run(
000611:             ["node", str(harness_path)],
000612:             cwd=ROOT,
000613:             text=True,
000614:             stdout=subprocess.PIPE,
000615:             stderr=subprocess.STDOUT,
000616:             check=False,
000617:             env={**os.environ, "TZ": "Europe/London"},
000618:         )
000619:     print(completed.stdout, end="")
000620:     if completed.returncode != 0:
000621:         raise SystemExit(completed.returncode)
000622:     return 0

000157: const gmStorage = new Map();
000158: const calls = [];
000159: function record(name, ...args) {{ calls.push({{ name, args }}); }}
000160: function clearCalls() {{ calls.length = 0; }}
000161: function wasCalled(name) {{ return calls.some(call => call.name === name); }}
000162: function callFor(name) {{ return calls.find(call => call.name === name); }}
000163: function pathValue(object, path) {{ return path.split(".").reduce((value, key) => value?.[key], object); }}

000314:     assert.equal(value.uiTheme, "mapCommand");
000315:     assert.equal(value.theme, "default");
000316:     assert.equal(value.position, "bl");

000045: 
000046: def extract_function(source: str, masked: str, name: str) -> str:
000047:     pattern = re.compile(rf"\b(?:async\s+)?function\s+{re.escape(name)}\s*\(")
000048:     matches = list(pattern.finditer(masked))
000049:     if len(matches) != 1:
000050:         raise AssertionError(f"Expected one declaration for {name}, found {len(matches)}")
000051:     match = matches[0]
000052:     open_pos = masked.find("{", match.start())
000053:     if open_pos < 0:
000054:         raise AssertionError(f"Opening brace not found for {name}")
000055:     close_pos = audit.matching_brace(masked, open_pos)
000056:     if close_pos is None:
--- lines 54-86 (match 70) ---
000054:         raise AssertionError(f"Opening brace not found for {name}")
000055:     close_pos = audit.matching_brace(masked, open_pos)
000056:     if close_pos is None:
000057:         raise AssertionError(f"Closing brace not found for {name}")
000058:     return source[match.start():close_pos + 1]
000059: 
000060: 
000061: def values(pattern: str, text: str) -> list[str]:
000062:     return sorted(set(re.findall(pattern, text)))
000063: 
000064: 
000065: def assert_static_routes(source: str, fixtures: dict) -> None:
000066:     masked = audit.mask_non_code(source)
000067:     create_panel = extract_function(source, masked, "createPanel")
000068:     handle_action = extract_function(source, masked, "handleAction")
000069:     handle_setting = extract_function(source, masked, "handleSettingChange")
000070:     toggle_feature = extract_function(source, masked, "toggleFeature")
000071: 
000072:     actions = values(r'data-action\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000073:     settings = values(r'data-setting\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000074:     tabs = values(r'data-tab\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000075:     rendered_toggles = sorted(set(
000076:         re.findall(r'makeToggleButton\(\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000077:         + re.findall(r'data-toggle\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000078:     ))
000079:     handled_actions = values(r'action\s*===\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', handle_action)
000080:     handled_settings = values(r'setting\s*===\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', handle_setting)
000081:     toggle_routes = values(r'feature\s*===\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', toggle_feature)
000082:     setting_families = values(r'setting\.startsWith\(\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']\s*\)', handle_setting)
000083: 
000084:     assert actions == sorted(fixtures["actions"]), "Visible data-action inventory changed"
000085:     assert settings == sorted(fixtures["settings"]), "Visible data-setting inventory changed"
000086:     assert tabs == sorted(fixtures["tabs"]), "Panel tab inventory changed"

000065: def assert_static_routes(source: str, fixtures: dict) -> None:
000066:     masked = audit.mask_non_code(source)
000067:     create_panel = extract_function(source, masked, "createPanel")
000068:     handle_action = extract_function(source, masked, "handleAction")
000069:     handle_setting = extract_function(source, masked, "handleSettingChange")
000070:     toggle_feature = extract_function(source, masked, "toggleFeature")

000073:     settings = values(r'data-setting\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000074:     tabs = values(r'data-tab\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000075:     rendered_toggles = sorted(set(
000076:         re.findall(r'makeToggleButton\(\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)
000077:         + re.findall(r'data-toggle\s*=\s*["\']([^"\']+)["\']', create_panel)

000448:     resetEnvironment();
000449:     const previousRaw = JSON.stringify({{ theme: "default", position: "br" }});
000450:     localStorage.setItem(SCRIPT.storageState, previousRaw);
000451:     state = loadState();
000452:     let applyAttempts = 0;
000453:     applyLoadedConfiguration = () => {{
000454:         applyAttempts += 1;
000455:         if (applyAttempts === 1) throw new Error("fixture apply failure");
000456:         record("applyLoadedConfigurationRollback");
000457:     }};
000458:     assert.throws(() => applyImportedToolkitSettings({{ state: fixtures.modernState }}), /fixture apply failure/);

000460:     assert.equal(state.position, "br");

000465:     for (const [feature, path] of Object.entries(fixtures.toggleStatePaths)) {{
000466:         resetEnvironment();

000468:         toggleFeature(feature);
000469:         await Promise.resolve();

000457:     }};

000598: }});
000599: '''
000600: 
000601: 
000602: def main() -> int:
000603:     source = SOURCE.read_text(encoding="utf-8")
000604:     fixtures = json.loads(FIXTURES.read_text(encoding="utf-8"))
000605:     assert_static_routes(source, fixtures)
000606:     harness = build_harness(source, fixtures)
000607:     with tempfile.TemporaryDirectory(prefix="missionchief-settings-ui-contract-") as temporary:
